mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, config_key, config_value, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user_ui_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND config_key = #{configKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_ui_config (user_id, config_key, config_value, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = #{configValue}, update_time = NOW()
